title: Homepage Update
summary_raw: Today i updated the color-scheme of the webite tp match that of the business. I also fixed some grammatical and spelling errors on multiple pages. I also updated the calendar widget and fixed a couple small bugs. I also looked over visitor logs to make sure we are maintaining plenty of traffic. I'll update if I have any ideas to increase that figure.
summary_ai: Today, I aligned the website's color scheme with our brand and corrected grammar and spelling errors across several pages. I updated the calendar widget and resolved minor bugs. I also reviewed visitor logs to ensure strong traffic flow. I will propose strategies for increasing traffic as needed.
